display_name: A Big Game Bounty contract marks a player with a high elimination count to be eliminated in a limited time. The contract is shown on the Tac Map at the end of the first playzone and will not target the same player several times in a row.
source_title: Call of Duty: Warzone | Call of Duty Wiki | Fandom

display_name: A Bounty contract tasks the team with killing a specific player, who is marked by a yellow circle revealing their approximate position on the map. When a player is marked as a bounty target, they and their team can see a bar on their heads
source_title: Call of Duty: Warzone | Call of Duty Wiki | Fandom

display_name: A CCTV near metro exits may have spotted something...
source_title: Call of Duty: Warzone | Call of Duty Wiki | Fandom

display_name: A Contraband contract has a small chance of occurring after completing any of the aforementioned contracts. Among the loot the team is rewarded with, Contraband will spawn, appearing as a bright blue suitcase. It must be picked up and brought to a highlighted point for helicopter extraction within a time limit. This contract rewards the team with an unlock for one of many unique weapon blueprints.
source_title: Call of Duty: Warzone | Call of Duty Wiki | Fandom

display_name: A corrupted image could give a clearer picture...
source_title: Call of Duty: Warzone | Call of Duty Wiki | Fandom

display_name: A Most Wanted contract marks its user for all enemies to see, offering a reward to any player who can eliminate them in a limited time. Letting the time run out completes the contract, rewarding the player and their team with Cash as well as redeploying any eliminated teammates.
source_title: Call of Duty: Warzone | Call of Duty Wiki | Fandom

display_name: A prisoner in the gulag had intel on the chemical's origins...
source_title: Call of Duty: Warzone | Call of Duty Wiki | Fandom

display_name: A Recon contract will have the team capture a set point in the map by standing near it, similar to a point in Domination . Completing the contract will give the team one circle peek. Doing more Recon contracts can give additional circle peeks, until the final circle is revealed.
source_title: Call of Duty: Warzone | Call of Duty Wiki | Fandom

display_name: A Scavenger contract will mark 3 Supply Boxes located near the player's location, one at a time, and task the team with looting each in a limited time. An Armor Satchel is guaranteed in the final supply box.
source_title: Call of Duty: Warzone | Call of Duty Wiki | Fandom
